\noindent Before we can evaluate the sample, we must first
provide audit values. These should be provided in
a list of the same order as the list of sample
book values. We first copy the list of book
values into a data frame.

\par\addvspace{\topsep}
\begingroup
\fvset{listparameters={%
  \setlength{\topsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\partopsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\parsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}%
}}
\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
myResults = ar.sample.loc[:, ["item", 
"bv"]].rename(columns={"bv": "av"}).copy()
myResults
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
